Place your site assets in this folder. Suggested files and paths used in the UI:

- `/assets/logo.png` — primary AIMS logo (shown in navbar if you reference it there)
- `/assets/favicon.ico` or `/favicon.svg` — browser favicon
- `/assets/naac-cert.jpg` — NAAC certificate image (referenced on NAAC and Home pages)
- `/assets/hero-campus.jpg` — homepage hero/campus background if you want a custom image
- `/assets/admission.jpg` — admissions section image on Home
- `/assets/associations/` — optional: store association images (programs page)

You can swap any existing external image URLs in components/pages with these local paths once you add the files. Save images in reasonable web sizes (e.g., 1400px wide) and optimized JPG/PNG/WebP.
